use serde::Deserialize;

// GOOD: required fields without defaults, optional fields with defaults
#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Config {
    database_url: String,
    port: u16,
    max_connections: u32,
    api_key: String,
    #[serde(default = "default_log_level")]
    log_level: String,
}

fn default_log_level() -> String {
    "info".to_string()
}

fn load_config(path: &str) -> Result<Config, Error> {
    let content = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: Config = serde_json::from_str(&content)?;
    Ok(config)
}

fn parse_request(body: &str) -> Result<Request, Error> {
    let request: Request = serde_json::from_str(body)?;
    Ok(request)
}
